stocks.impact_theory: Netflix issued cautious guidance post-earnings, citing slower subscriber growth amid competition. This implies reduced revenue forecasts, pressuring margins in a high-content-cost environment. Market psychology shifts to fear of saturation in streaming. Historical parallel: 2022 subscriber miss led to 35% drop. Analogies: Like a movie theater losing audience to Netflix itself; or a buffet overfilling plates leading to indigestion.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Pre-market plunge of 10%, X sentiment negative on guidance, broader market rally not helping. Web news confirms cautious outlook.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid or wait for bottom; potential rebound if market overreaction, +5% if support holds.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short with target 580, potential 10% gain; cover on oversold bounce.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings overreaction reversal on dip-buying; broader tech rally spillover.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings miss and guidance, high volume confirmation.

stocks.impact_theory: Bullish analyst upgrades and commentary on space sector growth. Economic boost from contracts, risk-on sentiment. Psychology: FOMO in space theme. Parallel: 2021 SPCE hype. Analogies: Rocket fuel igniting; small engine revving to supersonic.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 12.7% pre-market gain, positive X mentions, aligns with market rally.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Volatility in small-cap space stocks; dilution risks.

stocks.impact_theory: Lowered full-year guidance due to cost pressures, supply issues. Implies weaker earnings, defensive health sector hit. Psychology: Loss of safe-haven appeal. Parallel: 2020 COVID guidance cuts. Analogies: Medicine tasting bitter; shield cracking in battle.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 6% drop on guidance cut, high pre-market volume.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long on dividend yield support, +3% recovery.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Defensive rebound in risk-off; dividend support.

stocks.impact_theory: Strong volume reversal from lows, bullish charts on X. EV demand steady amid market rally. Psychology: Reversal FOMO. Parallel: 2023 recovery runs. Analogies: Tesla accelerating out of pit stop; battery fully charged.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive X sentiment, low volume dip reversed, market tailwind.

stocks.impact_theory: China iPhone shipments up 20% vs market down, analyst upgrade. Boosts China revenue fears easing. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallel: Post-2022 China recovery. Analogies: iPhone phoenix rising; apple falling into fortune.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 3% gain, upgrade to $300 PT, X positive.
